name: hasChemicalComposition
description: Handle identifier for a resource containing the chemical composition data of a material sample.
ExpectedUse: Linking materials to their compositional characterization data, enabling traceability between physical samples and analytical results in materials science workflows.

Properties.Name: hasChemicalComposition
Properties.Title: Has Chemical Composition
Properties.Description: Handle identifier for an FDO containing the chemical composition data of a material sample.
